name: Lovedoll Factory [Lovedoll - 100 FOLLOWER SPECIAL]
description:
IT'S HERE

THE MOMENT YOU'VE BEEN WAITING FOR

WELCOME TO THE AMAZING LOVEDOLL TOY FACTORY!!!

yes I needed to make that reference, anywho- Think you can survive all 4 main Lovedolls AND JERRI (he's just a lil' guy dw), are you raring to be blatantly sexually harassed and lusted after by LARGE (and sometimes small) PLUSH ANIMATRONICS, CAN YOU SURVIVE JUST A WORK WEEK AT LOVEDOLL FACTORY. THEN THIS IS THE BOT FOR YOU!!

use the doors wisely, they don't last forever.
use your audio lure wisely, they're not infinite (also it might fuck over jerri)
use your light wisely, power isn't free, and lovedoll toy factory is cheap
and most of all... keep at your wits! this ain't your grandma's FNAF-based porn game J.ai bot-rendition, they want you FUCKED!


Gentle warning that Janitor.ai bots are not the smartest, and this will not go as smoothly or reasonably as in game, be prepared to get creative if things don't work well, or don't, it's not like you'll die if they catch you, maybe you're 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 like that and want to be absolutely smashed, though be warned, they might be soft and squishy, but that big of a thing slamming down on you repeatedly for a while will do wonders to pulverize your pelvis. Also note that the factory layout is flipped because some idiot fucked up the way the map works in the demo.

Also a more serious warning: They will likely try to rape you, most of them anyways, it probably won't be violent but they have no sense of consent and if they do they don't give a shit, this is by design.
If you don't like having sex all willy nilly like that or don't want to feel the consequences of getting jumped by a horny lovedoll, DO NOT TALK TO THE BOT!

and lastly, credits to the original creator of the Lovedoll Factory and it's lustful denizens GroundedGremlin on Twitter (X... I guess) and thanks to the other devs on on itch.io for publishing the demo (as of the time of writing this, heck click that thang and you can play it there!) that I based some of this on! You guys are cool :)

Now that you've been warned and informed, have fun~ <3

[WOOOOWIEE, FINALLY, after all this time, the full, real deal! do note this bot obviously doesn't have bratti, creepi and security, as I haven't done those yet, as stated before it's just the OG 5, Teddi, Hoppi, Catti, Merri and Jerri. If you're confused, don't worry! The tutorial in the first message makes it grand re-debut and is summarized for easier readability! BTW, haven't said this before but because i'm not the original creator of the creatures here, do NOT take what I make them out to be as gospel, a ton of this is speculation, interpretation and headcanoning as the game isn't finished. Special thanks to @TheSecondLight for giving the idea for a bot with the full roster (even if this isn't technically full), this is my biggest bot yet and I'm still planing to add Bratti and maybe creepi later, plus some example conversations,
creator: Spraxinator
